visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a montage of a woman in a yellow hoodie being jokingly overwhelmed by falling gift boxes and red envelopes. Colorful text labels representing family members float around her. (2) The scene transitions to a studio setting where the woman stands behind a table filled with various colorful character-themed gift boxes from 7-Eleven. She points at the products with high energy. (3) Close-ups follow for a Starbucks-branded red tin, which she opens to reveal egg rolls and a can of coffee inside. (4) She then presents a pink Starbucks tin containing different snacks. (5) A large Ultraman head figurine that functions as a capsule machine is demonstrated; a ball rolls out of its mouth into a tray. (6) Two Kuromi-themed figurines, a purple piggy bank and a pink snake-costume version, are showcased. (7) A box featuring a lion illustration is opened to show a small figurine and packaging inside. (8) A yellow rabbit-snake figurine is displayed on the desk. (9) Finally, she interacts with a large multi-window 'punch-box' gift set featuring the OPEN-chan character, poking a hole in one window and pulling out a prize. (10) The video ends with her posing behind all the products and waving.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: POV：過年要準備送禮給你的. [Variety]: 爸爸媽媽 大伯 二叔 叔公 小阿姨 四姑婆 大姑姑 小姑姑 三舅舅 姨丈 嬸嬸 奶奶 還有婆家!. (2) [Slogan]: 新年又快到了 是不是開始擔心 送錢沒溫度 送春聯又太無聊 想要好吃又好玩的禮盒. (3) [Logo]: 7-ELEVEN. [Slogan]: 都幫你準備好了!. (4) [Slogan]: 想要送禮大氣 就選星巴克禮盒. [Subtitle]: 星巴克精選咖啡蛋捲禮盒 $580. (5) [Subtitle]: 星巴克咖啡捲心酥禮盒 $420. [Slogan]: 好少女啊. (6) [Slogan]: 可愛吸睛 就選下面這幾款. [Subtitle]: ULTRAMAN 家庭扭蛋機禮盒 $1499. (7) [Subtitle]: 每盒有12顆扭蛋 (隨機出貨 無法指定款式) 共有18款可收藏 好吃又好玩. (8) [Slogan]: 國中小女生的偶像. [Subtitle]: Kuromi 達摩造型存錢筒軟糖禮盒 $699. (9) [Subtitle]: Kuromi 蛇年限定造型糖果桶 $1688. [Slogan]: 招財又可愛!! 送小女生會超愛哦. (10) [Slogan]: 玩家收藏禮盒. [Subtitle]: 喜年來朝隈俊男聯名公仔蛋捲禮盒 $599. (11) [Subtitle]: 日本公仔大師聯名開發 喜年來朝隈俊男聯名公仔蛋捲禮盒. [Slogan]: 買禮盒也有抽盲盒的快感. (12) [Slogan]: 好想兔蛇蛇如意 存錢筒蝦米球禮盒. [Subtitle]: 好想兔蛇蛇如意存錢筒蝦米球禮盒 $699. (13) [Subtitle]: 卡哇伊大頭蛇造型存錢筒 粉絲必收藏. (14) [Slogan]: 最後重頭戲就是. [Subtitle]: OPEN將戳戳樂 15開運進寶禮盒. (15) [Subtitle]: OPEN!蛇年戳戳樂開運禮盒 $399. [Slogan]: 超級回到過年的感覺 復古童趣 又有新年喜氣 洋洋好彩頭的感覺. (16) [Subtitle]: 每包的話呢 都會有50元的商品卡 幸運的話還有機會抽到 $200元 7-ELEVEN商品卡喔. (17) [Subtitle]: 這幾款呢 都是7-ELEVEN獨家販售 7-ELEVEN 春節真好禮 收藏 & 送禮兩相宜. (18) [Logo]: 7-ELEVEN. [Slogan]: 有7-ELEVEN過年送禮大加分 快到7-ELEVEN 挑選你喜歡的禮盒吧.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman wearing a bright yellow oversized hoodie and black leggings, with long dark hair.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A minimalist studio with white walls, a wooden table for product display, and a background shelf featuring various gift boxes.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female speech introduces the festive theme over a fast-tempo, upbeat pop BGM. Frequent 'whoosh' SFX transition between the intro montage shots. (2) A transition sound accompanies the switch to the studio scene. A percussive 'ding' sound effects trigger as prices and labels appear on screen. (3) A new male voice takes over the narration for product details, speaking at a rapid, enthusiastic pace. The BGM remains consistent with a strong electronic beat. (4) Distinct mechanical 'clicking' and 'thud' sounds are heard during the demonstration of the Ultraman capsule machine. (5) Fast-paced vocal interplay between the female host and male narrator continues as each product is introduced, punctuated by 'pop' UI sound effects. (6) The female voice returns for the final call to action, maintaining a high arousal and positive valence, closing over the continuing upbeat BGM.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Problem -> Multiple Solutions -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote various character-branded and premium gift sets available at 7-Eleven for the Lunar New Year, highlighting their variety, playability, and gifting appeal through an energetic showcase.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct mention of 7-Eleven as the source, display of brand logos, and listing of specific prices for all products shown.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High production value commercial for social media, utilizing fast editing and character appeal to drive holiday shopping behavior at 7-Eleven.
